The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate
From The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate
To The Stewards
Document 29
Date 22 May 2026
Time 18:32
Title Technical Delegate's Report
Description New PU elements for this Competition
Enclosed 05 CAN GP 26 TDR5.pdf
Jo Bauer

2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 - 24 May 2026 
  
 
From :  The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate  
To :  The Stewards Date :  22 May 2026 
  
 
TECHNICAL DELEGATE’S REPORT 
 
 
The following driver will be is using a new motor generator unit-kinetic (MGU-K) for the 
remainder of the Competition: 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used MGU-K 
    
23 Atlassian Williams Mercedes Alexander Albon 1 
 
The motor generator unit-kinetic used by Alexander Albon is one (1) of the three (3) new motor 
generator units-kinetic allowed for the 2026 Championship season and this is in conformity with 
B8.2.2 f) of the 2026 Formula One Sporting Regulations. 
 
 
The following driver will be using a new power unit ancillary component (PU-ANC) for the 
remainder of the Competition: 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used PU-ANC 
    
23 Atlassian Williams Mercedes Alexander Albon 2
